mapper.select: SELECT exam_id, examinee_id, score, submitted_at, is_reviewed FROM exam_result ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
SELECT exam_id AS examId, submitted_at AS submittedAt, score, is_reviewed AS reviewed, result_id AS resultId, FROM exam_result WHERE examinee_id = #{userId}

SELECT e.*, -- ExamVO의 모든 필드 er.result_id, er.examinee_id, er.score, er.submitted_at, er.is_reviewed -- ExamResultVO의 모든 필드 FROM exam e JOIN exam_result er ON e.exam_id = er.exam_id WHERE er.result_id = #{resultId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_result (exam_id, examinee_id, score, submitted_at, is_reviewed) VALUES (#{examId}, #{examineeId}, 0, COALESCE(#{submittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '1900-01-01 00:00:00'), false)

INSERT INTO result_detail (result_id, exam_id, question_id, is_correct) VALUES
(#{detail.resultId}, #{detail.examId}, #{detail.questionId}, #{detail.isCorrect})
mapper.select: SELECT e.exam_code AS examCode, e.title AS title, e.started_at AS startedAt, e.finished_at AS finishedAt, e.exam_time AS examTime, er.result_id AS resultId, er.score AS score, er.submitted_at AS submittedAt, er.is_reviewed AS isReviewed, u.nickname AS nickname, u.email AS email, u.login_id AS loginId, u.user_role AS userRole, u.reg_date AS regDate FROM exam_result er JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id JOIN nlbuser u ON er.examinee_id = u.user_id WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId} AND er.examinee_id = #{examineeId}
SELECT * FROM exam_result WHERE exam_id=#{examId} and submmited_at = CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' as timestamp)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO exam_result (result_id, exam_id, examinee_id, score, submitted_at, is_reviewed) VALUES
(#{result.resultId}, #{result.examId}, #{result.examineeId}, #{result.score}, #{result.submittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{result.isReviewed})
mapper.select: select result_id from exam_result where exam_id = #{examId} and submitted_at = '1900-01-01 00:00:00'
SELECT result_id, exam_id, examinee_id, score, submitted_at, is_reviewed FROM exam_result WHERE result_id = #{resultId}
